sections.paragraph:
- Original: οὐδέ

- Transliteration: Oude

- Phonetic: oo-deh'

- Definition:

1. but not, neither, nor, not even

- Origin: from G3756 and G1161

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Conjunction

- Strong's: From G3756 and G1161; not however that is neither nor not even: - neither (indeed) never no (more nor not) nor (yet) (also even then) not (even so much as) + nothing so much as.
